description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a thick, black bezel. The screen is slightly recessed and has a subtle reflective surface, suggesting a glass or plastic cover. The monitor is supported by a wide, circular pedestal stand that provides stability and elevates the display above the surface. A small, round button is visible on the lower right corner of the bezel, likely serving as a power or control button. The rear and side profiles reveal a slim, tapering body that thickens toward the base, typical of modern LCD or LED monitors. No visible ports or branding are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A flat-panel computer monitor with a thick black bezel, circular pedestal stand, and a single button on the lower right bezel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's slim, tapering profile and the circular pedestal stand.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rectangular screen, thick black bezel, and a small button on the lower right bezel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim profile and circular stand seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the monitor and the full circular base, with no visible ports or branding.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, flat, and black with sharp corners and a smooth, matte finish, providing a strong visual frame around the display area.
attribute_stand_type: Circular pedestal stand with a wide, flat base, made of plastic or metal, offering stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single round button is located on the lower right corner of the front bezel, separated from other controls.
